file_path.description: Project-relative path of the file to create or modify

content.description: Full file body (mode=write) or replacement block (mode=patch)

mode.description: write = create/overwrite whole file; patch = replace patch_target with content

patch_target.description: Exact existing text to replace; required when mode=patch, must match exactly once

create_dirs.description: Create missing parent directories; null means false
